question: How does asset-regime and tax-design mismatch contribute to wealth concentration by failing to target the asset structures through which concentrated wealth now compounds?

expected_outputs.description: At least one new or updated grounding note
At least one grounded scenario update or named case variant

notes: Grounded the wealth concentration branch in a bounded US asset-regime and tax-design mismatch case to test whether design/rule conflict travels cleanly outside climate.
